code:
import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut seen = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if v == x
      seen = true
      result = list.push(result, v)
    else if not inserted and v > x
      result = list.push(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, v)
      inserted = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted and not seen
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = sorted.len()
  while j < m
    let v = match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
